mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT(table_name, '-queryFaultDistribution') AS result FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'fault_detail' LIMIT 1
SELECT CONCAT(table_name, '-queryFaultDetail') AS result FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'fault_detail' LIMIT 1
SELECT CONCAT(table_name, '-countFaults') AS result FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = 'fault_detail' LIMIT 1
